title: Fukashigi No Karte Music Disc
description: It replaces the Blocks Music Disc with Fukashigi No Karte from Rascal does not dream of a bunny girl sempai
body:
🎼 Fukashigi no Karte Music Disc  
Bring mystery and melancholy to your jukebox—replace Minecraft’s “Blocks” disc with *Fukashigi no Karte*, the hauntingly beautiful ending theme from *Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai*.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the “Blocks” music disc with *Fukashigi no Karte* audio  
✅ Compatible with vanilla jukeboxes and redstone music setups  
🧩 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
